LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY COURTNEY EVERETTE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. FINAL JUDGMENT SUBMITTED, TO BE SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.(302/HK)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENT PROPERTY $50,408.00 U.S. CURRENCY IS FORFEITED TO THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11488.5(B)(1). RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $396.00 U.S. CURRENCY REMAINS IN SAN FRANCISCO POLICE PROPERTY ROOM SUBJECT TO LITIGATION BY INTERESTED PARTY BYRON KAMINSKY. PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11488.5(B)(2), FORFEITED PROPERTY SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED AS SET FORTH IN HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 (SEE SCANNED "FINAL JUDGMENT FOR FORFEITURE AS TO INTERESTED PARTY COURTNEY EVERETTE" FOR FULL DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Courtney Everette; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Rebecca Wagner, Officer Ryan Jones And Chloe Mosqueda; (Proposed Order)
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rebecca Wagner, Assistant District Attorney (415-553-4997) for Petitioner/Moving party PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
No other Appearance

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Courtney Everette.

Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for final judgment as to Interested Party Courtney Everette is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Moving party to submit a proposed order. Final Judgment submitted, to be signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
